questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: 10 ml of a sample of $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2$ solution liberates 112 ml of $\mathrm{O}_2$ gas at STP upon decomposition. Identify the correct statement(s):
options: Normality of the above sample of $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2$ is 0.5 N
15 ml of the same sample of $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2$ solution liberates 224 ml of $\mathrm{O}_2$ gas at 1.5 atm and $273^{\circ} \mathrm{C}$

Milliequivalents of hypo required for the titration of liberated $\mathrm{I}_2$ when 10 ml of the same sample of $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2$ solution is treated with excess of acidified solution of KI are 20
questions.solution:
10 ml of $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2$ solution liberates $112 \mathrm{ml} \mathrm{O}_2$ at STP
$\therefore 1 \mathrm{~L}$ of $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2$ solution liberates $11.2 \mathrm{LO}_2$ at STP
$\therefore$ volume strength of $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2$ solution $=11.2 \mathrm{~V}$
$\therefore \mathrm{N}=\frac{\mathrm{V}}{5.6}=\frac{11.2}{5.6}=2 \quad \% \mathrm{w} / \mathrm{v}=\frac{\mathrm{N} \times 17}{10}=3.4 \%$

15 ml of same $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2$ solution liberates $\frac{15 \times 112}{10} \mathrm{ml} \mathrm{O}_2$ at STP
$\begin{aligned}
& =\frac{15 \times 112}{10} \times \frac{2}{3} \times 2 \mathrm{ml} \mathrm{O}_2 \text { at } 1.5 \mathrm{~atm} \text { and } 273^{\circ} \mathrm{C} \\
& =224 \mathrm{ml} \mathrm{O}_2
\end{aligned}$
meq. of $\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}_2$ reacted with $\mathrm{KI}=\mathrm{N} \times \mathrm{V}=2 \times 10=20$
$\therefore$ meq. of hypo required $=20$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
